response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A (the stream contains no vocal music). 2. JSON Usage: Fully manual transcription of spoken English commentary, as no lyrics reference was applicable. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed precisely to spoken dialogue, capturing vocal bursts, occasional humming, and laughter to maintain perfect synchronization with the gameplay.

subtitles.original: I'll probably make like two rounds of...

subtitles.original: ...one round of egg. Every time I get sugar, I'll get egg.
subtitles.english: ...one round of egg. Every time I get sugar, I'll get egg.

subtitles.original: We do have to stop by the shop soon, though, to even grab a different axe...
subtitles.english: We do have to stop by the shop soon, though, to even grab a different axe...

subtitles.original: I can put it on the dirt fence, but like,
subtitles.english: I can put it on the dirt fence, but like,

subtitles.english: I would have to raise the water level a bit.

subtitles.original: And then I would have to like...
subtitles.english: And then I would have to like...

subtitles.original: ...climb over, because it's most likely going to fall outside into the water.
subtitles.english: ...climb over, because it's most likely going to fall outside into the water.

subtitles.original: Oh, I mean we easily made...

subtitles.english: Okay, one round down. We'll do one more round...

subtitles.original: And then, I think we can go sell after that,
subtitles.english: And then, I think we can go sell after that,

subtitles.original: ...because I think the axe is going to break, too.
subtitles.english: ...because I think the axe is going to break, too.

subtitles.english: Yeah, my axe is definitely going to break soon.

subtitles.original: Okay, how about we go until the axe breaks, and then we'll just go... have to go buy a new one anyways...
subtitles.english: Okay, how about we go until the axe breaks, and then we'll just go... have to go buy a new one anyways...

subtitles.original: Ah! We almost have a million in our wallet,

subtitles.english: I think 8 million might be doable if I keep going.

subtitles.english: If I don't stop farming until...
